title: Master Yi Xing
content:
Master Yi Xing
 is

youngest of the 
Three Chen Brothers
.

 History
[
]

He attempted to embarrass 
Wang Lin
 as he had unwittingly spread his divine sense over the city. However, Wang Lin soon turned the tables on him and injured him. Three Chen Brothers all came to apologize and Wang Lin accepted their apology. Afterwards, 
Master Yi Chen
 introduced him to Wang Lin.

Soon after, 
All-Seer
 attacked Wang Lin because he took the Extreme Yang from the dying 
Bai Wei
. He spectated from afar.

Afterwards, he met Wang Lin when the latter was passing through his home planet after subduing Master Hollow Wind.
